produce the definite integral of $ P(x) = 4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7 $ from $ x = 0 $ to $ x = 10 $, the total nutritional value for a 10-gram portion of the lasagna is calculate as follows:  
produce the integral $ \int_{0}^{10} (4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7) dx $, the result is $ 2500 + 333.33 + 100 + 70 = 2933.33 $, representing the total nutritional value for a 10-gram portion of the lasagna.
